n: Book 9, Chapter 3: Orcs Beneath the Eaves

steps.t: You heard a voice coming from a misty dell south of the Orc camp beneath the eaves of Fangorn, and should investigate.
Corudan is at Éomer's Vengeance, south-east of the eaves of Fangorn. You encountered an Ent called Baldbark, and he sent you out of Fangorn with littl…
